---
title: "Programming Practice: Lab 4"
execute:
  enabled: true
  echo: false
  cache: true
format:
  html:
    code-fold: false
jupyter: python3
diagram:
  cache: true
  cache-dir: ./cache
  engine:
    tikz:
      execpath: lualatex
filters:
  - diagram
---

# SQL part 2

In this lab we will continue working on the blocks database.

## Exercise 1
Create Python classes for all the 4 entities. You may reuse `Vote`/`Block` classes you created in [lab2](./lab2.qmd).

## Exercise 2

1. Please write Python code for `SELECT` statements for the 4 entities in [lab3](./lab3.qmd).
2. This code should be inside methods of the classes in Exercise 1.
